request: Correct agent role boundary in authority docs: image generation belongs to Analyst, not Researcher.
request_original: 근데 이미지 생성을 리서쳐가 왜해? analyst가 해야지 권위 문서 수정해
tier_rationale: Updates 4 authority documents (researcher.md, analyst.md, tool-permissions.md, researcher-procedure-ko.md) plus CURRENT_STATE pointer. No product runtime impact but operational role surface change. Includes retroactive CORRECTION for TASK-20260429-020 mis-attribution.

include: docs/operations/tool-permissions.md (image generation tool row + activity-split rule)
exclude: TASK-020 deliverables (poster.png etc — they remain valid; only agent attribution corrects)

success_criteria: researcher.md explicitly forbids generation outputs (image, code, doc, copy) and limits Researcher activity to research summary even within shared external CLI invocations.
analyst.md adds responsibility 7 covering Tier 1/2 creative-output direct generation including external CLI tool invocation.
researcher-procedure-ko.md section 1 has activity-split rule (search vs generation in shared invocation).
tool-permissions.md matrix has image generation tool row with Analyst ✅ / Researcher ❌ / Generator ✅ task/* limited.
CURRENT_STATE.md authority pointer table reflects all 4 version bumps and last-update line points to TASK-20260429-021.
TASK-20260429-020 ledger has CORRECTION event explicitly noting Researcher → Analyst attribution correction for image generation portion of the prior smoke test.
logs/insights.jsonl has cross-reference amendment that re-attributes INS-20260429-020-01 image-gen-capability to Analyst-discoverable rather than Researcher-discoverable.
TASK-20260429-021 own report self-applies new agent-by-agent format and demonstrates correct attribution.

positive: Preserve TASK-020's actual deliverables (poster.png, research-summary.json, poster-prompt.md) — only attribution gets corrected.
negative: Do not include secrets or env values.
Do not modify Generator/Validator role docs (this Task is specifically about Researcher↔Analyst boundary).
Do not retroactively rewrite TASK-020 report (that report stands; only ledger gets a CORRECTION).
